author: Kuknacke
title: Became worse!
content: The amount of ads has increased to a level that’s starting to become unbearable. Every time I start the app ads start rolling. This wasn’t the case before.

author: WittiC70
title: Gets worse with every update
content: This is now the second or third update whereafter well know and functioning menus und functions are redone and made worse. DLNA server is nowhere to be found anymore.

author: Tossans @
title: Duplicated files??
content: The player works well as such, but I have a very annoying problem, it downloads the same music over and over so in some albums I have each song 5, 10 or even 20 times..

author: making lol
title: Im in love
content: Its just amazing and I just love it

author: kamoosk
title: Hoppar ur chromecast
content: Går inte att sända till min anläggning via chromecast. För övrigt tar det långt tid att spela upp en låt från goohle drive.

author: Bagera82
title: Best flac player for iPAD
content: After looking for a good looking and easy to use player, I finally found this. This is the best there is, worth every penny.

author: Jackkkkkkkqww
title: Update breaks it
content: Was perfect in the previoud update, now there are audio crackling and stutters during playback and the new interface changes makes it less useable. A shame since it was the absolute best player available.

author: Firm112
title: Good but can be better
content: Doesnt show pictures of album Every time.. Maybe a bug that can be fixed?

author: MrSmokehead
title: Not that good
content: This app could be good but it's not. You can only play music from your playlist one time. Then you need to remove the songs and add them again to make playable.
